objectives.title: Improve Patient Safety
objectives.description: Patient safety is the cornerstone of clinical excellence. Nawaloka Hospital Negombo currently records a hospital-acquired infection (HAI) rate of 3.1% — above the NHS England benchmark of 2.0%. The Trust Board has made patient safety the highest-priority objective for 2025–2028, with a zero-tolerance approach to preventable patient harm. Achieving this objective requires a system-wide cultural shift towards proactive clinical risk prevention.

objectives.title: Modernise Hospital Technology
objectives.description: Nawaloka Hospital Negombo's current IT infrastructure was last comprehensively upgraded in 2016, with significant reliance on paper-based clinical records. This objective will transform the Trust into a digitally mature, data-driven organisation through the deployment of a cloud-hosted Electronic Health Record system and AI-powered diagnostic tools. Enhanced cybersecurity measures will also be implemented to protect sensitive patient data.

objectives.title: Enhance Patient Experience and Satisfaction
objectives.description: The Friends and Family Test (FFT) score for Nawaloka Hospital Negombo is currently below the London average, with significant outpatient waiting times and limited translation services. This objective aims to place the patient at the centre of every service decision by redesigning the patient journey, introducing multilingual communication, and systematically collecting and acting on patient feedback to improve satisfaction and loyalty.

objectives.title: Develop and Retain a Skilled Workforce
objectives.description: A skilled workforce is essential for delivering high-quality healthcare. Nawaloka Hospital Negombo faces challenges with nursing vacancy rates and staff retention. This objective focuses on implementing comprehensive training programs, career development pathways, and employee engagement initiatives to attract and retain top talent, ensuring that the hospital maintains a competent and motivated workforce.

objectives.title: Achieve Financial Sustainability
objectives.description: Financial sustainability is critical for the long-term viability of Nawaloka Hospital Negombo. The Trust has experienced a significant deficit in the previous financial year. This objective will focus on optimizing procurement processes, enhancing revenue cycle management, and identifying new funding opportunities to ensure that the hospital can operate within its means while continuing to invest in quality care.
